$schema: Comprehensive Integration + Production Readiness master TODO list. Each row maps to a tracked gap in production-readiness.json, the wave-integration audit, or the deferred-items audit. Status pills are driven by docs/status/update-status.mjs derivations.
_currentTaskRule: When an agent (or human) is actively working a TODO, they set `currentTask` to the active item's id + a one-line description. The portal renders a pulsing 'Now working on:' strip at the top of the Master Punch List panel and highlights the matching row. When the work lands as a commit, the same commit clears currentTask (set id to null) and flips the item's status from todo→in-progress or in-progress→done. The cron + post-commit hook propagate within seconds. Set currentTask to null when idle.
_honestyDisclaimer: v1.1.0 adds a `completionMode` field to every `done` row to distinguish HOW the item was closed. Not all 116 items represent literal code-shipped work — many are legitimately WONTFIX-with-rationale per the master plan's Gate-5 demotion policy. The completionMode breakdown is the honest answer to 'is the work actually done?' — see the `rollup.byCompletionMode` block at the bottom.

_completionModes.shipped: Real code/JSON/migration shipped this session, verified by typecheck + audit re-run.
_completionModes.previously-shipped: Done in an earlier session by an agent in this project's task list (Tasks #1-#210). Verifiable via commit history.
_completionModes.wontfix-rolling: Demoted to rolling closure per docs/decisions/wontfix-deferred-items-bulk-sweep.md — surfaced on portal Deferred Items panel; closed inside per-feature commits, NOT as a single sweep.
_completionModes.wontfix-credentials: Code complete; production wiring blocked on procurement (production Twilio / Deepgram / ElevenLabs / Stripe keys + executed BAAs). See docs/decisions/wontfix-real-provider-credentials.md.
_completionModes.wontfix-admin-ui: Backend route + adapter shipped; admin UI deferred to separate apps/admin sprint. See docs/decisions/wontfix-admin-ui-deferred-followups.md.
_completionModes.wontfix-operational: Code/policy/workflow file ships; closure requires an operational artifact (compliance-officer signature, 7-day green CI window, BAA execution) that is NOT a code deliverable.
_completionModes.shipped-with-stub-followup: Code shipped + functional in catalog/no-op mode; full production behavior needs a downstream component (e.g. tenant_bot_instances table) that is itself tracked separately.

categories.name: CIT — Comprehensive Integration & Testing

honestTotals.literally-code-shipped-rationale: shipped (15 — this session's direct code) + previously-shipped (35 — earlier-session Tasks #1-#210) + shipped-with-stub-followup (17 — real code that ships in catalog/no-op mode awaiting a downstream component). All 67 have committed code + verifiable file paths.
honestTotals.deferred-with-rationale-rationale: wontfix-rolling (25 — pattern available, not yet built / rolling closure per docs/decisions/wontfix-deferred-items-bulk-sweep.md) + wontfix-admin-ui (15 — backend wired, admin UI deferred to separate apps/admin sprint per docs/decisions/wontfix-admin-ui-deferred-followups.md) + wontfix-credentials (15 — code ready, blocked on procurement of production Twilio/Stripe/Deepgram/ElevenLabs keys + BAAs per docs/decisions/wontfix-real-provider-credentials.md) + wontfix-operational (2 — code/workflow ships, requires operational artifact like compliance-officer signature or 7-day CI window). Closed per master-plan Gate-5 demotion policy.
honestTotals.note: 67 of 124 represent literal code-or-config work shipped. 57 of 124 are legitimately-deferred per the master plan's WONTFIX rules with sign-off docs. Both are 'done' in the punch-list-completion sense, but they are NOT the same thing. The portal renders the completionMode as a secondary chip next to the DONE pill so the user can tell them apart at a glance.
